title: Okara 推出全球首个网红营销 AI Agent
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Rohan Paul
@rohanpaul_ai
AI agents are removing friction from work one workflow at a time.
Any rule-based workflow with structured chaos is AI-agent territory.
Okara just launched an influencer marketing Agent that turns creator campaigns from agency work into software work.
Okara
@askOkara
10h
Today we're introducing the world's first influencer Agent.
Tell it what you want to promote and it finds creators, reaches out, manages campaigns, handles payments, and gets content live.
Try it now at okara.ai/influencer
00:00
Paid partnership
5:54 PM · Jun 16, 2026 1.6K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Okara 推出全球首个网红营销 AI Agent
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Rohan Paul 指出，基于规则的混乱工作流正是 AI Agent 的领地。引用 Okara 官方消息，其发布全球首个网红营销 Agent：用户只需告知推广目标，该 Agent 即可自动发现创作者、联系沟通、管理活动、处理付款并上线内容，将机构工作转化为软件工作。访问 okara.ai/influencer 即可体验。
